summary: Verified mock data removal from LaBrand platform. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend empty states confirmed working for Social Listening, Share of Voice, Conversion Attributes, and Brand Tracking modules.

issues: After login, user is redirected to /onboarding flow if onboarding_completed is false

passed_tests: Health check endpoint returns healthy status
Admin login with admin@labrand.com works correctly
Social Listening dashboard returns has_data:false with empty state message when no mentions
Social Listening mentions returns empty list when no data
Share of Voice returns has_data:false with proper Portuguese message when no mentions
Share of Voice trend returns empty array with has_data:false when no history
Conversion Attributes analysis returns has_data:false when fewer than 5 surveys
Conversion Attributes matrix returns empty quadrants when no data
Brand Tracking history returns has_data:false with message when no snapshots
Brand Tracking comparison endpoint works even with limited data
BVS history returns has_data:false with message when no history records
BVS main score calculates based on real data only
PDF Report generation with POST method works and returns valid PDF
Reports history endpoint returns list of generated reports
Frontend Social Listening shows 'Nenhuma rede social conectada' empty state
Frontend Share of Voice shows 'Sem dados de Share of Voice' empty state
Frontend Conversion Attributes shows 'Dados insuficientes' empty state
Frontend Brand Tracking shows empty state with 'Criar Primeiro Snapshot' option
critical_code_review_comments: All mock data generation functions have been correctly removed from backend
Empty states return proper has_data:false flag and Portuguese messages
Frontend components correctly check has_data flag and display appropriate empty state UI

mocked_apis_verified.note: All mock data generation has been removed. APIs return real data from database only.

features_verified.social_listening_empty_state: Returns has_data:false, message='Nenhuma menção encontrada. Conecte suas redes sociais em Integrações para começar a monitorar.'
features_verified.share_of_voice_empty_state: Returns has_data:false, message='Nenhuma menção encontrada. Configure o monitoramento em Social Listening e adicione concorrentes para comparar.'
features_verified.conversion_attributes_empty_state: Returns has_data:false when < 5 surveys, message='Dados insuficientes. São necessárias pelo menos 5 pesquisas de atributos para gerar a análise.'
features_verified.brand_tracking_empty_state: Returns has_data:false when no snapshots, message='Nenhum snapshot de tracking disponível. Crie um snapshot manual ou aguarde a coleta automática.'
features_verified.bvs_history_empty_state: Returns has_data:false when no history, message='Nenhum histórico BVS disponível. O histórico será gerado conforme o score é calculado ao longo do tempo.'
features_verified.admin_cleanup_endpoint: GET /api/admin/clean-mock-data/{brand_id} - Cleans mock social_mentions, sample_surveys, auto_tracking, sov_config, social_config
features_verified.pdf_report_generation: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/reports/executive-pdf - Returns valid PDF with sections summary, pillars, recommendations

social_listening.frontend_ui: Shows 'Nenhuma rede social conectada' with 'Conectar Redes Sociais' button

share_of_voice.frontend_ui: Shows 'Sem dados de Share of Voice' with 'Configurar Social Listening' button

brand_tracking.frontend_ui: Shows 'Nenhum snapshot disponível' with 'Criar Primeiro Snapshot' button

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mock data removal verified complete. All modules (Social Listening, Share of Voice, Conversion Attributes, Brand Tracking, BVS History) now return proper empty states with has_data:false when no real data exists. No simulated/mock data is generated. Frontend shows appropriate Portuguese empty state messages with CTAs to configure each feature. Admin cleanup endpoint works. PDF report generation works. Use admin@labrand.com / LaBrand@2024! for testing.
